meaning: n.拥有数百万家财的富豪,千万富翁
examples: The average age of a multimillionaire is 39.
In the end the billionaire trounced the mere multimillionaire.
Kelly was a multimillionaire contractor who was a triple Olympic Gold Medal winner.
His royalty agreement with Rio Tinto, a London-based multinational, soon made him a multimillionaire.
The Raleigh News and Observer had called Pope, a conservative multimillionaire, the Knight of the Right.
